field.label: Categ.
field.expression: (select descripcion from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde <= CONCAT(RIGHT(REPLACE('[__hastafecha__]', '/', ''), 4), SUBSTRING(REPLACE('[__hastafecha__]', '/', ''), 3, 2), LEFT(REPLACE('[__hastafecha__]', '/', ''), 2)) order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1)

select PERSONAL_TARJETA.tarjeta FROM PERSONAL_TARJETA where PERSONAL_TARJETA.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and STR_TO_DATE('[__hastafecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') > PERSONAL_TARJETA.fechaDesde order by PERSONAL_TARJETA.fechaDesde DESC limit 1
field.label: Tarjeta

field.expression: case when PERSONAL.fechaEgreso != '0000-00-00' then 'resaltadoRojo' else '' end
case when PERSONAL.fecing >= str_to_date('[__desdefecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') then 'resaltado' else '' end

field.label: Años
field.expression: CONCAT(IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) > 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) - (MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5) < MID(fecing, 6, 5)), IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) < 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) + (MID(fecing, 6, 5) < MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5)), (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)))), ' Años')

field.label: meses
field.expression: CONCAT(IF((((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) > 0, (((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) - (MID(CURDATE(), 9, 2) > MID(fecing, 9, 2)), IF((((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) < 0, (((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))) + (MID(fecing, 9, 2) < MID(CURDATE(), 9, 2)), (((YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(CURDATE())) - ((YEAR(fecing) - 1) * 12 + MONTH(fecing))))) - IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) > 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) - (MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5) < MID(fecing, 6, 5)), IF((YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) < 0, (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)) + (MID(fecing, 6, 5) < MID(CURDATE(), 6, 5)), (YEAR(CURDATE()) - YEAR(fecing)))) * 12 , ' Meses')

field.label: Extras 50
field.expression: SUM(CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > 0 and (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) < FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) >= FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end)

field.label: Extras 100
field.expression: SUM(CASE when (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) > FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 then (TIME_TO_SEC(TIMEDIFF( TIMEDIFF((case when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) >= '00:30:00' && TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) <= '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':30:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) < '00:30:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) ,':00:00') when TIMEDIFF((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:55:00' then CONCAT(substring((case when !isnull(h4) then h4 else h2 end), 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') end), (case when TIMEDIFF(h1, CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') ) > '00:05:00' then CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2) + 1 ,':00:00') else CONCAT(substring(h1, 1, 2),':00:00') end)) , TIMEDIFF(hegreso, hingreso))) / 3600) - FICHADADIA.max_extras_50 else 0 end )

field.label: Horas
Proyeccion
field.expression:
select concat(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)/3600)) as char),':', LPAD(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)%3600)/60)AS CHAR),2,'0'),':', LPAD(CAST((sum(FF.minutos)%60) AS CHAR),2,'0')) from (select F1.fecha,
@egr2:= (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.horario = [__idJornada__] and H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing2:= (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.horario = [__idJornada__] and H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing",
ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( @egr2 , @ing2 )), 0)
as "minutos"
from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= (select (case when fechaDesde < '[__desdefecha__]' then '[__desdefecha__]' else fechaDesde end) from SECCIONHISTORIA where fechaDesde <= '[__hastafecha__]' and IdPersona = '[__idPersona__]' order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and F1.fecha <= (select (case when fechaEgreso = '0000-00-00' then '[__hastafecha__]' else fechaEgreso end) from PERSONAL where IdPersona = '[__idPersona__]') and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF

field.label: Diferencia
field.expression: SELECT sec_to_time([__hextras50__] * 3600 + [__hextras100__] * 3600 + (ifnull((select time_to_sec(SEC_TO_TIME(sum(FF.minutos))) from (select F1.fecha, @egr:= (SELECT H.egreso from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing:= (SELECT H.ingreso from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing", @h1:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = [__idPersona__] and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 0, 1) as "h1", @h2:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = [__idPersona__] and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 1, 1) as "h2", @h3:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = [__idPersona__] and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 2, 1) as "h3", @h4:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = [__idPersona__] and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 3, 1) as "h4", ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when @h2 > @egr then @egr else @h2 end , case when @h1 < @ing then @ing else @h1 end )), 0) + ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when @h4 > @egr then @egr else @h4 end , case when @h4 < @ing then @ing else @h3 end )), 0) as "minutos" from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= '[__desdefecha__]' and F1.fecha <= '[__hastafecha__]' and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF), 0) - ifnull(( select time_to_sec(concat(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)/3600)) as char),':', LPAD(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)%3600)/60)AS CHAR),2,'0'),':', LPAD(CAST((sum(FF.minutos)%60) AS CHAR),2,'0'))) from (select F1.fecha, @egr2:= (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.horario = [__idJornada__] and H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing2:= (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.horario = [__idJornada__] and H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing", ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( @egr2 , @ing2 )), 0) as "minutos" from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= '[__desdefecha__]' and F1.fecha <= '[__hastafecha__]' and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF), 0)) )

select count(*) from FRANCOS_PER F join CALENDAR ON CALENDAR.fecha >= F.fechainicio and CALENDAR.fecha <= (case when F.fechafin = '0000-00-00' then str_to_date('[__hastafecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') else F.fechafin end) where F.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CALENDAR.fecha >= str_to_date('[__desdefecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and CALENDAR.fecha <= str_to_date('[__hastafecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and dayofweek(CALENDAR.fecha) NOT IN (1,7) and CALENDAR.fecha NOT IN (select idFeriado from FERIADOS)
field.label: Faltas
